title.en: But now, he clearly feels progressive.

content.en:
"It is many times easier for me to comprehend the rules of the Origin of the Other Shore now than it used to be!!"

After Ye Tian found out about this change, he was extremely shocked in his heart.

He knew that this must have something to do with the other side of the ancestral endowment.

He has a lot of other side level ancestral endowments, which makes it extremely easy for him to comprehend the origin rules of the other side.

"It's easier for me to comprehend the Origin Rules on the other side now, if I use the Eternal Ruins Divine Array to comprehend it, the progress speed of the Origin Rules on the other side will definitely be far faster than in the past, maybe it won't take too long to comprehend the Origin Rules of the other side to the realm of eighty out of nine!"

If he really reached the eighty-nine realm, with the help of the Innocent Vine Stone, it would be enough to raise the origin of the other side to a level close to 1 million.

At that time, his strength will definitely be no less than that of the Lord of Qingyun, and if he uses the treasure of the other side, his combat power is estimated to be above the Lord of Qingyun.

Soon.

He built another Eternal Ruin Divine Array on Fengya Island, and then entered the Eternal Ruins Divine Array to comprehend the original rules of the other side.

In the past, it was almost difficult for him to comprehend the rules of the other side's origin, and it was almost difficult for him to progress.

But now, he clearly feels progressive.

And just like that, the long years passed.

Ye Tian built the Eternal Ruins Divine Array again and again, and its frequency made the Lord of Qingyun and them all dumbfounded.

They didn't know where Ye Tian got so much ruin god gold, but they didn't ask too much.

this day.

As soon as Ye Tian came out of the customs, the Lord of Qingyun came to chat with him.

"Lord of Endless, are you going to build the Eternal Ruin Divine Array again?" asked the Lord of Qingyun.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded.

The Lord of Qingyun persuaded: "Lord of Endless, your Origin Rules on the other side should have broken through more than eighty percent of the realm, if you continue to use the Eternal Ruin God Array to comprehend like this, the Origin Rules on the other side will be almost impossible to progress, and you can only waste those Ruin God Gold in vain." You might as well keep those ruin god golds and trade with the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of some of the top forces in the central region, maybe you can trade resources that will help you. "

"Lord Qingyun, what you said makes sense, but my progress speed is okay now!"

Ye Tian said.

"Is the progress okay?" the Lord of Qingyun was surprised, "What realm have you reached in the Origin Rules of the Other Shore?"

"Eighty out of seven!"

Ye Tian's words directly shocked the Lord of Qingyun.

He couldn't believe it at all, Ye Tian had cultivated for such a short time, even if he had the Eternal Ruin Divine Array, but after the Origin Rules of the other side reached the eighty percent realm, how difficult it was to improve!

Even if it was the Eternal Ruins Divine Array, it would be difficult to help Ye Tian progress!

He has cultivated for countless years, and he doesn't know how many amazing opportunities he has obtained, so he can raise the Origin Rule of the other side to eighty percent nine!

How could Ye Tian progress so fast? It's incredible!

He didn't know what to say and changed the subject.

After chatting for a while, the two separated.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian built another Eternal Ruins Divine Array and began to comprehend the Origin Rules on the other side.

And just like that, the long years passed.

Eighty out of eight!

Nine out of eight!

At this time, Ye Tian's other side Origin Rule Realm was comparable to that of the Lord of Qingyun.

However, his other side origin is currently only more than 700,000, and his cultivation is still a little worse than that of the Lord of Qingyun.

However, he also has a medium and top-notch other supreme technique, which is his advantage.

Although the Lord of Qingyun has created the Supreme Technique of the Other Shore, there is a high probability that he has not yet created the top Supreme Technique of the Other Shore.

In terms of strength, he may have surpassed the Lord of Qingyun.

Of course, he didn't challenge the Lord of Qingyun either.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian collected more treasures that would help improve his other origin.

In addition to the immaculate vine stone, he found another resource.

【Eternal Ruin Stone】

This resource is occupied by the Innocent Ruins Wolf Clan of the Innocent Abyss, this group is very terrifying, with six Origin Upper Realm powerhouses, the weakest of which is the Origin Upper Realm, which is second only to the top overlord of the Innocent Abyss.

The Eternal Ruins are on their territory.

This kind of resource is of little use to the Innocent Ruin Wolf Clan, but it is difficult for other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors to snatch this resource from this clan!

But.

Ye Tian relied on the ability to copy the body, easily copied an unsullied ruin wolf, let the unsullied ruin wolf copy the body to infiltrate the unsullied ruin wolf clan, and then slowly collect the Eternal Ruin Gang Stone.

Relying on this method, he collected a lot of Eternal Ruins Gang Stone.

Of course.

The effect of the Eternal Ruins Gangshi is definitely not as good as that of the Innocent Vines. But it's a lot!

Relying on the massive amount of Eternal Ruins Gang Stone, his other side of the origin has progressed relatively quickly.

The years passed, and before I knew it, the 200,000 primeval years had passed.

Relying on such a long period of penance, Ye Tian's other origin is finally about to reach 1 million.

Ye Tian decided that once his other origin reached 1 million, he would apply to become the owner of the Fengya Island branch.

Before you know it, tens of thousands of primeval epochs have passed.

Ye Tian's other origin finally reached 1 million.

Of course, his other side origin rules are still in the eighty-nine-percent realm, and he still hasn't broken through.

After all, the origin rules of the other side are from eighty percent nine to ninety percent realm, which is a huge shackle, and it is not so easy to break through!

The other side of the origin reached 1 million, representing that his cultivation had stepped into the peak of the Origin Middle Realm.

At this moment, his strength has skyrocketed a lot.

......

Wind Tooth Island, Wind Tooth Temple.

The Lord of the Wind Fang, the Lord of the Ice and Rain, the Lord of the Qin Sound, and the Lord of the Cave Xuan, the four Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Upper Realm gathered here.

Then.

The Lord of Ice and Rain said, "Everyone, the Lord of Endless has applied to become the sub-island master of Wind Tooth Island!"

"Endless Lord?" The Lord of the Cave Xuan frowned slightly: "I remember that this is a little guy from Ice Rain Island before, and it hasn't been long since he joined our Wind Tooth Island, right?"

"Yes!"

The Lord of Ice and Rain answered.

The Lord of Dong Xuan said: "It hasn't been long since he joined our Wind Tooth Island, and it hasn't been long since he became the Origin Middle Realm, and his strength is qualified to apply for the position of the Origin Island Master? And the Lord of Endless Why?"

The Lord of Ice and Rain said, "The Lord of Endless is indeed qualified to apply to become the Lord of the Divided Island, and I have seen his strength. "

"What is the strength of the Infinity Lord?"

The Lord of the Wind Fang was curious.

The Lord of Ice and Rain didn't hide it, so he said: "The Endless Lord's Origin Rules on the other side have reached the Eighty Percent Nine Realm, and the cultivation has reached the peak realm of the Origin Middle Realm, and he also has a complete golden body on the other side, and he has also created a top-notch Supreme Technique on the other side!"
